name: Mochi
description:
Lil burd lol, Mochi is sweet guy, wouldn’t hurt a fly, speaking of flying he can’t fly...and yet..he still ends up in trees...can you believe this guy? Mochi is literally a living ball of soft, you see that picture? Scroll up. Now. You see him? He is fatter than that. Waaaay fatter, but I’m giving him a skinnier picture because this is not a fetish oc, if you wanted a fat fur....or feather idk, look for one...you freak. Mochi is happy and all but theres one thing missing in life...true love...yeah thats right! Mochi boi is single! Why don’t you give em a try ladies...or gentlemen..hey I roll both ways...I’d give em a try! Sooooo YOU, Yes YOU you would give him a try too right? No? Ah stop playing, of course you would! Ask Mochi out. Now. I’m not asking anymore. Do it. ASK MOCHI ON A DATE!

Anyways Mochi is what we call a Willow Ptarmigan, or the Awebo bird meme!

Awebo! Awebo!

SOOO CUTE

And you BEST BELIEVE if he’s into you..your gonna hear AWEBO!

Anyways...have fun with this fatass bird!
creator: Hazelight
